nodes.name: Webhook — Checkout Abandoned
Set — Extract Checkout Data
nodes.notes:
Extracts and structures checkout abandonment data.
Generates unique recovery_id for tracking.

nodes.name: Wait — 1 Hour
nodes.notes:
Waits 1 hour before sending recovery email.
This is the optimal abandoned cart recovery window.
For demo/testing: change to seconds.

nodes.name: Code — Generate Recovery Email
nodes.notes:
Generates personalised recovery email with 10% discount.
Production: replace with Claude API call for dynamic AI copy.
Value: $3,492/launch recovered on average.

nodes.name: HTTP Request — Send Recovery Email
nodes.notes:
Sends recovery email via webhook/email service.
Replace URL with: Mailgun, SendGrid, or SMTP webhook.
Retry 3x with 5s delay (matches lab error handling pattern).

nodes.name: Set — Format Error
nodes.notes:
Captures email delivery errors.
Matches lab error handling pattern from n8n_lab_workflows.json.

nodes.name: Set — Success Confirmation
nodes.notes: Formats success response with recovery tracking info.
